metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Chris Johnson

plugins.name: claude-text-to-speech
plugins.description: Voice responses from Claude Code using macOS text-to-speech. Toggle with 'voice on' / 'voice off'.

plugins.name: homebot-cycle-setup
plugins.description: Homebot Shape Up cycle kickoff: pulls the cycle brief from Notion, finds pitches you drive, and creates one Linear project per pitch with milestones derived from the pitch.
